title: プリーズ、マイトレーナー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My meeting ran over, and now I'm late for my training session with
Taiki Shuttle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I arrive at the training course to find Taiki standing alone, looking
utterly dejected.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wahhh! Traineeer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her tearful hug is akin to a crushing tackle.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yes... Sorry for breaking down on ya like that, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I just can't handle flyin' solo. I get so lonely that the tears start
flowing nonstop.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Everything was fine while all my friends were here training and I had
people to talk to...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But eventually, everybody else went home, and I was left all on my
lonesome. And you were nowhere to be found...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to tell since she's always surrounded by friends, but it seems
she gets lonely pretty easily.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sob... Oh?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sorry. Guess all that crying made me hungry.
choice_data_list: Let's get something good to eat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To make up for missing her training session, I decide to treat Taiki to
a meal.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ooh, a sit-down restaurant!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Look at all the food and drinks to choose from! It's like I've died and
gone to heaven!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Really?! Trainer, you're as givin' as the day is long!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, did that not come across? Sorry! I just meant... you're really
generous!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What should I go with? Steak? A hamburger? Or maybe the special
deluxe parfait?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: ...On second thought, I'll take 'em all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I let Taiki keep ordering until her stomach is sufficiently satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...It's probably best not to dwell on how light my wallet has become.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whew! Thank ya, Trainer! I'm so full—and so happy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But Japanese steaks are a little on the small side...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The steaks I used to eat with my family were twice—no, three times as
big!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That sure takes me back. I always loved talkin' with my family and
friends over a good meal.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I miss them all so much...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki hangs her head sadly. Considering how easily she gets lonely,
the homesickness must be particularly hard on her.
choice_data_list: I'll be here for you so you don't feel lonely.
I'll be here for you so you don't feel lonely.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Thank ya! Thank ya very much!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm not going home yet! Not till I win the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: My precious family and friends are rootin' for me.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I love seeing their happy smiles every time I win!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Seeing everybody smile is my favorite thing in the whole, wide world!
Nothin' makes me happier!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So I won't let a little loneliness stop me from giving it my all!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: With you by my side, I can take on the world!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yes! We'll make everybody happy—together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, with our spirits renewed, we set our sights on victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, look! I see Dober over there!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, friend!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? What?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Dobeeer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wha—gyah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems we still have a lot of work to do.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry! ☆
